{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220160422DB1D409EE1E1151171"}"},"total":166},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600715083859526425","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实我对这个战斗力翻倍系统挺看好的，可以保证前期战力不至于过高，导致完全没挑战性，又能跟上后期急速膨胀的战力系统，作者设置的剧情时间线也够长，看得出挺用心，不明白为什么评分这么低。
难道是因为跟主线差的太多吗，非主线内容填充的都是传统都市异能剧情，但是我其实看了还能接受，因为剧情虽然老套，但人物不算很无脑。比个别小说的逻辑在线多了。
总之作者加油吧，希望能看到你完本，或者出第二本书。","text_exts":[{"e":121,"s":117,"text":"都市异能","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E5%BC%82%E8%83%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774181764E1151171%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227600715083859526425%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227568881741276908569%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E5%BC%82%E8%83%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769683384,"group_id":"7568881741276908569","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2PNY11HPCbwj/ysmT6R5Y7KKd8A9Hqv9dKH5g9/6721","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2703044374963113","user_name":"白凰的向坂雄二"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2703044374963113","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7568881741276908569","book_info":{"abstract":"【刚开分，上涨中】
战斗力每年翻倍意味着什么？

弗利萨：“我的战斗力是，五十三万！”
江南：“那也太惨了。”

大特:“这个时空究竟发生过什么？为什么孙悟空先生直接超越了超级赛亚人？”
孙悟空：“你们时空里我师父不是江南吗？”

维斯：“比鲁斯大人，又一个人类超越你了哦！”
比鲁斯：“累了，我要继续沉睡了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ef74685f0eaf083ee33b25c769a19d61","author":"明迭","author_id":"","book_id":"7568881741276908569","book_name":"龙珠：无限进化，战斗力每年翻倍","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0c888","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":376,"name":"龙珠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=376&name=龙珠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582867693569589784","read_count":"41431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"421029"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.9","serial_count":"191","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,二次元,龙珠,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/34a53bf0b53c57e00782bd9f875ebc96~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365764&x-signature=kuvLtzIAgQKGB%2BrZdJaMcLKXNOI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"703301991278733","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220160422DB1D409EE1E1151171"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
